keys.name: ThemeDescription

keys.name: ThemeAuthor
keys.description: The author of the theme

keys.name: License
keys.description: The license under which the theme is distributed

keys.name: Look
keys.description: The overall rendering style of the window manager

keys.description: Border color of the active window

keys.description: Border color of inactive windows

keys.description: Text color of active (pressed) buttons

keys.description: Text color of selected text in input fields

keys.description: Background color of the APM/battery monitor

keys.description: Text color of the APM/battery monitor

keys.description: Color representing a full battery

keys.description: Color representing a low battery

keys.description: Color representing a critically low battery

keys.name: ColorApmGraphBg
keys.description: Background color of the APM battery graph

keys.description: Color representing user CPU time in the CPU monitor

keys.description: Color representing system CPU time in the CPU monitor

keys.description: Color representing hardware interrupt CPU time

keys.description: Color representing I/O wait CPU time

keys.description: Color representing soft interrupt CPU time

keys.description: Color representing nice CPU time

keys.name: ColorCPUStatusIdle
keys.description: Color representing idle CPU time

keys.name: ColorCPUStatusSteal
keys.description: Color representing stolen CPU time (virtual machines)

keys.name: ColorNetSend
keys.description: Color representing outgoing network traffic

keys.name: ColorNetReceive
keys.description: Color representing incoming network traffic

keys.name: ColorNetIdle
keys.description: Color representing idle network state

keys.name: ColorMEMStatusUser
keys.description: Color representing user memory usage

keys.name: ColorMEMStatusBuffers
keys.description: Color representing buffer memory usage

keys.description: Color representing cached memory usage

keys.name: ColorMEMStatusFree
keys.description: Color representing free memory

keys.name: DesktopBackgroundColor

keys.description: Path to the desktop background image

keys.description: Whether to scale the desktop background image to fill the screen

keys.name: DesktopBackgroundCenter
keys.description: Whether to center the desktop background image

keys.name: DesktopBackgroundMultihead
keys.description: Whether to span the desktop background across multiple monitors

keys.name: DesktopTransparencyColor
keys.description: Color used for pseudo-transparency on the desktop

keys.name: DesktopTransparencyImage
keys.description: Image used for pseudo-transparency on the desktop

keys.name: BorderSizeX
keys.description: Horizontal window border thickness in pixels

keys.name: BorderSizeY
keys.description: Vertical window border thickness in pixels

keys.name: DlgBorderSizeX
keys.description: Horizontal dialog border thickness in pixels

keys.name: DlgBorderSizeY
keys.description: Vertical dialog border thickness in pixels

keys.name: CornerSizeX
keys.description: Horizontal size of the window corner resize area

keys.name: CornerSizeY
keys.description: Vertical size of the window corner resize area

keys.name: TitleBarHeight
keys.description: Height of the window title bar in pixels

keys.name: TitleBarJustify
keys.description: Horizontal text alignment in title bar (0=left, 50=center, 100=right)

keys.name: TitleBarHorzOffset
keys.description: Horizontal pixel offset for title bar text

keys.name: TitleBarVertOffset
keys.description: Vertical pixel offset for title bar text

keys.name: ScrollBarX
keys.description: Width of vertical scroll bars in pixels

keys.name: ScrollBarY
keys.description: Height of horizontal scroll bars in pixels

keys.name: MenuIconSize
keys.description: Size of icons displayed in menus

keys.name: SmallIconSize
keys.description: Size of small icons (title bar, taskbar)

keys.name: LargeIconSize
keys.description: Size of large icons (quick switch, window list)

keys.name: HugeIconSize
keys.description: Size of huge icons

keys.name: RolloverButtonsSupported
keys.description: Whether the theme provides rollover (hover) button images

keys.name: TaskBarClockLeds
keys.description: Whether to display the taskbar clock using LED-style digits

keys.name: TrayDrawBevel
keys.description: Whether to draw a beveled edge around tray icons

keys.name: ShowMenuButtonIcon
keys.description: Whether to show the application icon on the menu button

keys.name: TitleBarCentered
keys.description: Whether the title bar text is centered between buttons

keys.name: TitleBarJoinLeft
keys.description: Whether the title bar joins seamlessly with the left border

keys.name: TitleBarJoinRight
keys.description: Whether the title bar joins seamlessly with the right border

keys.name: TitleButtonsLeft
keys.description: Buttons on left side of title bar (s=sysmenu, x=close, m=maximize, i=minimize, h=hide, r=rollup, d=depth)

keys.name: TitleButtonsRight
keys.description: Buttons on right side of title bar

keys.name: TitleButtonsSupported
keys.description: Which title buttons are supported by the theme

keys.name: QuickSwitchHMargin
keys.description: Horizontal margin inside the quick switch window

keys.name: QuickSwitchVMargin
keys.description: Vertical margin inside the quick switch window

keys.name: QuickSwitchIMargin
keys.description: Margin around icons in the quick switch window

keys.name: QuickSwitchIBorder
keys.description: Border width around the selected icon in the quick switch window

keys.name: QuickSwitchSepSize
keys.description: Size of the separator between icons and text in the quick switch window

keys.name: QuickSwitchIconSize
keys.description: Size of icons in the quick switch window

keys.name: QuickSwitchTextFirst
keys.description: Whether to show text above icons in the quick switch window

keys.name: QuickSwitchSmallWindow
keys.description: Whether to use a smaller quick switch window

keys.name: QuickSwitchMaxWidth
keys.description: Maximum width of the quick switch window (0 for no limit)

keys.name: QuickSwitchMaxHeight
keys.description: Maximum height of the quick switch window (0 for no limit)

keys.name: QuickSwitchFillSelection
keys.description: Whether to fill the background of the selected item in the quick switch window

keys.name: TaskBarCPUSamples
keys.description: Number of samples displayed in the CPU monitor graph

keys.name: TaskBarMEMSamples
keys.description: Number of samples displayed in the memory monitor graph

keys.name: TaskBarNetSamples
keys.description: Number of samples displayed in the network monitor graph

keys.name: TaskBarGraphHeight
keys.description: Height of taskbar monitor graphs in pixels

keys.name: Gradients
keys.description: Comma-separated gradient definitions for various elements
